title: PvPZX Resource Pack
description: Changes The Original/Vanilla Minecraft Swords to a shorter version.
body:
**PVP Resource Pack Information:**

_It Changes the Original/Vanilla Minecraft Swords to a shorter version of themselves for a more unique look primarily for a PVP Perspective._

_**Ingame Image of the Pack on 1.20.4**_



_![Image Of The Swords Ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/385884b96aaa21fdd396f0750566675b01d5ec05.jpeg)_
